allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe"; Get-Command rustup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; winget --version)

PowerShell(Set-Location D:\\dev\\puppy-home; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\puppy-home.exe" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $alive = Get-Process -Id $p.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($alive\) { "RUNNING pid=$\($p.Id\) title='$\($alive.MainWindowTitle\)'" } else { "EXITED early \(exit code $\($p.ExitCode\)\)" })
